description: Mathematical treatment of the physical principles governing the flow of groundwater; emphasis on well hydraulics and flow system analysis.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (GEOSCI 100,109,110,ATM OCN/​GEOSCI  105,140,ENVIR ST/​GEOSCI  106, orASTRON/​GEOSCI  160) and (MATH 217or221), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
